entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop that is the primary focus of the international workshop and research proceedings.

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: The venue where the international workshop on groundnut was held.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the ICRISAT Center is located.

entities.name: PRODUCTION AND TRADE
entities.description: Aspects of groundnut research focusing on how the crop is produced and traded globally.

entities.name: INFORMATION TRANSFER
entities.description: The process of sharing research and technical knowledge regarding groundnut.

entities.name: PROCESSING AND PRODUCTS
entities.description: The study of how groundnuts are processed into various products.

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach to managing pests affecting groundnut crops.

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: The genetic material of groundnut and its wild relatives used for breeding.

entities.name: WILD SPECIES
entities.description: Wild relatives of the groundnut crop used as genetic resources.

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The use of biological systems or living organisms to improve groundnut crops.

entities.name: CROP MODELING
entities.description: The use of mathematical models to simulate groundnut growth and yield.

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing new groundnut varieties with desired traits.

entities.name: CROP PHYSIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the physical and chemical functions of the groundnut plant.

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The study of nutrient requirements and management for groundnut crops.

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions affecting the health and yield of groundnut crops.

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Insects that cause damage to groundnut crops.

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops simultaneously, including groundnut.

entities.name: WEED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Techniques used to control weeds in groundnut cultivation.

entities.name: PRODUCTION TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The technical methods and tools used to increase groundnut production.
